allow: Bash(git commit -m 'Fix NameError: replace removed _DP_DIRTY_FACTOR in cartridge_optimise with DP_REPLACEMENT_BAR *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix ModuleNotFoundError: replace plotly chart with st.line_chart *)
Bash(pkill -f "streamlit run" 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; streamlit run app.py --server.port 8501 --server.headless true > /tmp/st.log 2>&1 & *)
